subcodes.first_line: O my beloved son! Thy letter was diffusing fragrance and invigorating the soul, for it was conducive of the fact that thy nostrils have become perfumed
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای فرزند عزیز نامه ات مشکبیز بود و روح انگیز زیرا دلالت بر ان داشت که مشامت
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
